A Thousand Cuts.name: A Thousand Cuts
A Thousand Cuts.description: Azzinoth's Assault now has a 30% chance to hit an additional time with your main-hand Weapon.

Abyssal Conditioning.name: Abyssal Conditioning
Abyssal Conditioning.description: Casting Felfury spenders now increases your Energy regeneration by 5% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 4 times.

Agonizing Presence.name: Agonizing Presence
Agonizing Presence.description: Embolden yourself with fel magic, increasing your threat generated by 125%.

Annihilan Rituals.name: Annihilan Rituals
Annihilan Rituals.description: Fully channeling Carve now refunds 1 Felfury.

Annihilan Strike.name: Annihilan Strike
Annihilan Strike.description:
|cff32cd32Generates 2 Felfury|r
Unleash a devastating attack, dealing 150% Weapon Damage to your target with both weapons.

This ability is guaranteed to critically strike against enemies above 75% health.

Annihilation.name: Annihilation
Annihilation.description: Gorge on fel energy, guaranteeing your next direct instance of damage to critically strike, but causing it to consume 5% of your maximum health. Lasts for 5 attacks or 12 seconds.

Anti-Magic.name: Anti-Magic
Anti-Magic.description:
When Hateforged Barrier is removed from you, you now reduce -10% of all Magic damage taken for 8 seconds.

In addition, Hateforged Barrier now heals for an additional 2% of your maximum health each tick.

Archimonde's Wrath.name: Archimonde's Wrath
Archimonde's Wrath.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Felfury spenders by 1% for every 10 points of Energy you have at the time of casting.

Armaments of the Legion.name: Armaments of the Legion
Armaments of the Legion.description: Reduces your chance to be hit by spells by -2% and increases the absorption value of Hateforge Barrier by 10%.

Azzinoth's Assault.name: Azzinoth's Assault
Azzinoth's Assault.description:
|cff32cd32Consumes 2 Felfury|r
Strike an enemy for Weapon Damage plus 22 with both weapons, additionally scaling with your attack power.

Azzinoth's Battery.name: Azzinoth's Battery
Azzinoth's Battery.description: Your Azzinoth's Assault now has a 30% chance to not consume Felfury.

Azzinoth's Rage.name: Azzinoth's Rage
Azzinoth's Rage.description: Increases your Armor penetration by 10% and your expertise by 4.

Bane of Betrayal.name: Bane of Betrayal
Bane of Betrayal.description:
|cff32cd32Generates 1 Felfury|r
Unleash chaotic magic on an enemy that causes each spell or ability they cast to add 1 stack to this effect for 30 sec.

At the end of the duration, deal damage to them based on how many stacks were accrued.

Can only have 1 |cffffffffBane|r active on a target at a time.

Bane of Chaos.name: Bane of Chaos
Bane of Chaos.description:
|cff32cd32Generates 1 Felfury|r
Unleash fel magic on an enemy, dealing 174 Chaos damage over 18 sec.

|cff32cd32Inner Demon|r: The enemy takes an additional 13 Chaos Damage every 6 sec.

Can only have 1 |cffffffffBane|r active on a target at a time.

@ext:Periodic damage dealt by this effect can critically strike.:ext@

Bane of Fire.name: Bane of Fire
Bane of Fire.description:
|cff32cd32Generates 1 Felfury|r
Unleash fire on an enemy, increasing their Fire damage taken and their chance to be critically struck with Fire spells from you by 20% for 18 sec.

Can only have 1 |cffffffffBane|r active on a target at a time.

Bane of Frailty.name: Bane of Frailty
Bane of Frailty.description:
|cff32cd32Generates 1 Felfury|r
Unleash cruel magic on an enemy, allowing you to ignore 15% of their Armor and to see them while stealthed or invisible for 1 min.

Can only have 1 |cffffffffBane|r active on a target at a time.

Bane of Power.name: Bane of Power
Bane of Power.description:
|cff32cd32Generates 1 Felfury|r
Unleash shadow magic on an enemy, increasing your critical strike chance against them by 50%, but increasing their damage dealt by 25%. Lasts for 3 critical strikes or 15 sec.

Can only have 1 |cffffffffBane|r active on a target at a time.

Battle Finesse.name: Battle Finesse
Battle Finesse.description: While channeling Carve, your chance to dodge is now increased by 1% based on how long you channel, up to a maximum of 10%.

Betray.name: Betray
Betray.description:
Taunts an enemy target to attack you for 3 sec.

|cff32cd32Inner Demon|r: Blast the enemy for 6 Shadowflame Damage.

Betrayer.name: Betrayer
Betrayer.description: Dodging attacks causes 40% off-hand Weapon Damage to attackers and enrages your party and raid members within 20 yds, increasing their critical strike chance by 2% for 10 seconds.

Betrayer's Inclinations.name: Betrayer's Inclinations
Betrayer's Inclinations.description:
Knowledge of demonkind allows you to track your kin, showing the location of all nearby Demons on the minimap. 

While active, your attacks against Demons have a 10% chance to deliver a |cffffffffBetrayer's Blow|r, dealing 28 Physical Damage and stunning the target for 2 sec.

Black Magic.name: Black Magic
Black Magic.description: Increases the damage of your Bane of Chaos and Ruin by 10%.

Blighted Strikes.name: Blighted Strikes
Blighted Strikes.description: While Inner Demon is active your melee attacks reduce the target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Blood of Mannoroth.name: Blood of Mannoroth
Blood of Mannoroth.description:
|cff32cd32Generates 6 Felfury|r
Soak in the blood of Mannoroth, increasing your Energy regeneration by 100% for 20 sec.

Blur.name: Blur
Blur.description: Fel energies blur your outline, temporarily reducing all your threat and reducing your damage taken from area of effect spells by 20% for 6 sec.

Bulwark of Azzinoth.name: Bulwark of Azzinoth
Bulwark of Azzinoth.description: Inner Demon now also reduces your damage taken by -10%.

Burning Commander.name: Burning Commander
Burning Commander.description:
Level 10 Passive
Allows you to wield a Two-Handed Axe, Mace, or Sword in each hand and grants you additional Armor and magic resistance based on your dodge rating.

Burning Hatred.name: Burning Hatred
Burning Hatred.description: Enrages you, instantly generating 6 Felfury and causing your melee damage to leech health to you equal to 50% of the damage dealt as Chaos damage for 15 seconds.

Burning Legionnaire.name: Burning Legionnaire
Burning Legionnaire.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Twin Slice and Sunder by -10.

Burning Rage.name: Burning Rage
Burning Rage.description: Increases the damage and reduces the cost of Sunder and Immolation Aura by 20%.

Carve.name: Carve
Carve.description:
Consumes 2 Felfury
Charge up a powerful attack over 2.5 seconds. 

Upon ending the channel, slash in front of you, dealing increased Weapon Damage with both weapons based on how long you channel, dealing less damage with each target struck. 

Inner Demon: Reduces affected enemies melee and ranged haste by -20% for 8 seconds.

Chaos Rush.name: Chaos Rush
Chaos Rush.description:
|cffffffff3 Charges, 10 sec recharge|r
Engulf yourself in fel energy and dash forward in the direction you're running.

Usable while rooted and removes root effects from you.

Chaos Soldier.name: Chaos Soldier
Chaos Soldier.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Azzinoth's Assault and Sargeron Smite by 5%.

Chaotic.name: Chaotic
Chaotic.description: Dealing damage now has an 8% chance to increase your damage by 3% for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Chaotic Intuition.name: Chaotic Intuition
Chaotic Intuition.description: Damage dealt by Felstrikes now extends the duration of Cripple on the target by 1 sec and grants you 1% increased spell critical damage for 6 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Consume Magic.name: Consume Magic
Consume Magic.description:
Steal 1 beneficial magic effect from an enemy.

If you successfully steal an effect, you deal 11 Shadow Damage to the enemy.

Consumed By Fel.name: Consumed By Fel
Consumed By Fel.description: Increases the tick rate of Immolation Aura by -25%.

Cripple.name: Cripple
Cripple.description: Cripple an enemy, slowing their movement speed and casting speed by 60%, decaying over 12 sec.

Cruelty.name: Cruelty
Cruelty.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 2% and an additional 3% against Demons.

Cunning.name: Cunning
Cunning.description: Reduces the duration of movement impairing effects on you by -20%.

Curse of Argus.name: Curse of Argus
Curse of Argus.description: Each time Bane of Chaos deals damage its damage is increased on the target by 1% for 6 seconds, stacking 20 times.

Cursed Flames.name: Cursed Flames
Cursed Flames.description: Critically striking with Fel Fireball now increases the critical strike chance of your next Fel Fireball within 10 seconds by 20%.

Dancing Blades.name: Dancing Blades
Dancing Blades.description:
Level 10 Passive
Critical strikes with melee abilities now trigger Dancing Blades, dealing off-hand Weapon Damage to up to 5 nearby enemies.

Dark Lord.name: Dark Lord
Dark Lord.description: While above 75% health, your damage taken is reduced by -5% and damage dealt is increased by 5%.

Dark Magician.name: Dark Magician
Dark Magician.description: While Inner Demon is active, casting Ruin, Sunder, or Felwrath now refunds 20 Energy.

Dark Teachings.name: Dark Teachings
Dark Teachings.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Intuitions by 20%.

Demon Hide.name: Demon Hide
Demon Hide.description: While Inner Demon is active, your Armor contribution from cloth and leather items is increased by 120%.

Demonfire Pact.name: Demonfire Pact
Demonfire Pact.description:
Emanate an aura that increases the critical strike chance of nearby allies by 3% and their damage against Demons by 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

Only 1 |cffffffffPact|r can be active per player at a time.

Demonic Blood.name: Demonic Blood
Demonic Blood.description: Generating Felfury now extends the duration of Inner Demon by 0.5 sec.

Demonic Embrace.name: Demonic Embrace
Demonic Embrace.description: Casting Inner Demon with at least 6 Felfury now restores 50 Energy.

Demonic Evasion.name: Demonic Evasion
Demonic Evasion.description: Increases your chance to dodge by 5%.

Demonic Fortitude.name: Demonic Fortitude
Demonic Fortitude.description: While Demonic Will or Hateforged Barrier are active, all damage taken or avoided now has a 20% chance to generate 1 Felfury.

Demonic Machinations.name: Demonic Machinations
Demonic Machinations.description: Critical strikes with Sargeron Smite now cause the target to bleed for an additional 50% of the damage dealt over 5 seconds.

Demonic Will.name: Demonic Will
Demonic Will.description:
Generates 1 Felfury
Strengthen your will, reducing Physical damage taken by -30% for 10 seconds.

While active, direct damaging abilities heal you for 3% of your maximum health. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.

Doomsayer.name: Doomsayer
Doomsayer.description:
Critical strikes with Sargeron Smite now refund 1 Felfury.

In addition, Sargeron Smite now deals 25% increased damage to enemies above 75% of their maximum health.

Doomscarring.name: Doomscarring
Doomscarring.description: Your melee critical strikes now deal an additional 1 + 30% AP Physical damage and scars enemies for 12 seconds, increasing your allies' attack power against them by 45 + 15% Agility.

Doomstride.name: Doomstride
Doomstride.description: Using Chaos Rush twice in a row now refreshes a charge of Chaos Rush.

Elemental Bane.name: Elemental Bane
Elemental Bane.description: Increases your critical damage by 10% and additionally increases your critical strike chance by 15% while fighting Elementals.

Embracing Evil.name: Embracing Evil
Embracing Evil.description: Increases the duration and reduces the Energy cost of Banes by 20%.

Enslave Elemental.name: Enslave Elemental
Enslave Elemental.description: Enslave the target hostile elemental for up to 40 sec (8 sec vs players), forcing it to fight for you. Only one target can be enslaved at a time.

Expose.name: Expose
Expose.description: Direct Fire and Shadow spell damage dealt now applies Expose to enemies.Expose (Proc)Damage taken from the Felsworn increased by 10% and the critical strike chance of all allies against this target is increased by 3% for 8 seconds.

Eye of Archimonde.name: Eye of Archimonde
Eye of Archimonde.description: Instantly reveals all stealthed and invisible enemies in a 30 yd radius around you.

Eye of the Tyrant.name: Eye of the Tyrant
Eye of the Tyrant.description:
Grant 10% increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members within 100 yds. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your attack power is increased by 5%.

Fel Apprentice.name: Fel Apprentice
Fel Apprentice.description:
Level 10 Passive
While Inner Demon is active, your Fel Fireball will now unleash a Felstrike on your target.FelstrikeBurn an enemy for 54 + 30% SP Shadowflame Damage over 6 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Fel Bargain.name: Fel Bargain
Fel Bargain.description: Tap into deprave fel energies, exchanging Energy for health. Every 2 points of Energy restore 1% of your maximum health.

Fel Blades.name: Fel Blades
Fel Blades.description: Damage dealt by Azzinoth's Assault now reduces the enemy's armor by -4% for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Fel Cannon.name: Fel Cannon
Fel Cannon.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Fel Fireball and Ruin by 15% on enemies above 75% health.

Fel Daze.name: Fel Daze
Fel Daze.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Fel Fireball by 10% and it's damage dealt now reduces the enemy's chance to hit by -3% for 6 seconds.

Fel Fireball.name: Fel Fireball
Fel Fireball.description:
|cff32cd32Generates 1 Felfury|r
Unleash a powerful fel fireball at an enemy, dealing 21 Fire damage.

Usable while moving.

Fel Flamecasting.name: Fel Flamecasting
Fel Flamecasting.description: Damage dealt by Sargeron Smite now spreads your Cripple to 2 nearby enemies.

Fel Haze.name: Fel Haze
Fel Haze.description: While active, Blood of Mannoroth now also causes you to ignore all enemy Armor.

Fel Infusion.name: Fel Infusion
Fel Infusion.description:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members within 100 by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your critical strike chance by 3%.

Fel Instincts.name: Fel Instincts
Fel Instincts.description: Increases the damage of Azzinoth's Assault by 10% and causes it to increase your melee haste by 20% for 5 seconds.

Fel Monstrosity.name: Fel Monstrosity
Fel Monstrosity.description:
Level 50 Passive
Increases your Stamina by 25% and size by 10%.

Fel Rift: Altar of Storms.name: Fel Rift: Altar of Storms
Fel Rift: Altar of Storms.description: Break open a rift through the nether, teleporting group members that use it to |cFFFFFFFFAltar of Storms|r.

Fel Rift: Dark Whisper Gorge.name: Fel Rift: Dark Whisper Gorge
Fel Rift: Dark Whisper Gorge.description: Break open a rift through the nether, teleporting group members that use it to |cFFFFFFFFDark Whisper Gorge|r.

Fel Rift: Mannoroc Coven.name: Fel Rift: Mannoroc Coven
Fel Rift: Mannoroc Coven.description: Break open a rift through the nether, teleporting group members that use it to |cFFFFFFFFMannoroc Coven|r.

Fel Rift: Orgrimmar.name: Fel Rift: Orgrimmar
Fel Rift: Orgrimmar.description: Break open a rift through the nether, teleporting group members that use it to |cFFFFFFFFOrgrimmar|r.

Fel Rift: Stonard.name: Fel Rift: Stonard
Fel Rift: Stonard.description: Break open a rift through the nether, teleporting group members that use it to |cFFFFFFFFStonard|r.

Fel Rift: Thunder Bluff.name: Fel Rift: Thunder Bluff
Fel Rift: Thunder Bluff.description: Break open a rift through the nether, teleporting group members that use it to |cFFFFFFFFThunder Bluff|r.

Fel Rift: Undercity.name: Fel Rift: Undercity
Fel Rift: Undercity.description: Break open a rift through the nether, teleporting group members that use it to |cFFFFFFFFUndercity|r.

Fel Torpedo.name: Fel Torpedo
Fel Torpedo.description:
Transforms your Chaos Rush into Fel Torpedo.Fel TorpedoGenerates 1 Felfury
Torpedo forward in the direction you're running and deal 195 + 35% AP Shadowflame Damage to enemies in your path.

Generates a large amount of threat. Scales with modifiers to Chaos Rush

Felbane.name: Felbane
Felbane.description: Curse an enemy, causing the next spell they cast within 4 seconds to be reflected onto them.

Felblade.name: Felblade
Felblade.description:
Level 40 Passive
Damage dealt by Fel Fireball, Sargeron Smite, and Twin Slice now additionally scales with your Agility.

Felbreak.name: Felbreak
Felbreak.description:
Interrupt a spell from being cast, preventing the target from casting spells of that school for 3 seconds and draining mana from the target based on your Spirit.

Usable while moving.

Felcaked Blades.name: Felcaked Blades
Felcaked Blades.description:
Level 50 Passive
Twin Slice and Sargeron Smite now additionally scale with your Agility.

Felfire Adept.name: Felfire Adept
Felfire Adept.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Sargeron Smite by 10%.

Felforged.name: Felforged
Felforged.description: Periodic damage dealt now has a 15% chance to grant you Felforged for 8 seconds.Felforged (Proc)Your next 3 Fel Fireballs have -30% reduced casting speed for 8 seconds.

Felgorged.name: Felgorged
Felgorged.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Cripple and Consume Magic by -10.

Felguard.name: Felguard
Felguard.description: Your Chaos Rush now reduces all damage taken by -3% for 5 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Felheart.name: Felheart
Felheart.description: Each Felfury active now increases your haste by 1%.

Felhoof Charge.name: Felhoof Charge
Felhoof Charge.description:
Generates 1 Felfury
Charge an enemy, dealing 60 + 28.5% AP Physical damage.

Felrend.name: Felrend
Felrend.description:
|cff32cd32Generates 1 Felfury|r
Erupt in a whirlwind of felfury, striking all enemies within 6 yds with both weapons, dealing Weapon Damage plus 7.

Felshock.name: Felshock
Felshock.description: Direct critical strikes with Felfury spenders now extend the duration of Inner Demon by 1 sec and cause enemies struck to have a 3% increased chance to be hit by spells for 12 seconds.

Felspill.name: Felspill
Felspill.description: Generating Felfury now leeches 10% AP health from 3 nearby enemies within 6 yds, scaling with your attack power.

Felstrider.name: Felstrider
Felstrider.description: Your Chaos Rush now increases your Energy regeneration by 10% for 5 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Felwracked.name: Felwracked
Felwracked.description: Every 3rd Twin Slice or Fel Fireball within 15 seconds now generates 1 additional Felfury.

Felwrath.name: Felwrath
Felwrath.description:
|cff32cd32Consumes 2 Felfury|r
Blast an enemy and all enemies near them with fel magic, dealing 122 Shadowflame Damage.

|cff32cd32Inner Demon|r: Striking at least 5 enemies with this spell causes it to deal an additional 8 Shadowflame Damage over 6 sec, stacking 3 times.

Focused Hatred.name: Focused Hatred
Focused Hatred.description: Direct magical critical strikes now generate 5 Energy.

Fury Unleashed.name: Fury Unleashed
Fury Unleashed.description:
Spin your glaives for 5 seconds, increasing movement speed by 30% and dealing 200% Weapon Damage every 1 sec with both weapons to all nearby enemies.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects.

Fury of Archimonde.name: Fury of Archimonde
Fury of Archimonde.description: After generating 10 Felfury, your next Sargeron Smite within 15 seconds gains 50% increased critical strike chance and damage.

Fury of the Illidari.name: Fury of the Illidari
Fury of the Illidari.description:
2 Charges, 1.5 min recharge
Move quickly from enemy to enemy, attacking them every 1 sec with both weapons until 6 assaults are made, generating 1 Felfury with each strike. While active you are immune to crowd control effects.

Can hit the same target multiple times. Cannot hit invisible or stealthed targets.

Glaiving.name: Glaiving
Glaiving.description: Increases the damage dealt and reduces the Energy cost of Fury Unleashed by 50%.

Greater Illidari Intuition.name: Greater Illidari Intuition
Greater Illidari Intuition.description: Empowers party and raid members with demonic energy, increasing their Agility by 77. Lasts 30 min.

Greater Man'ari Intuition.name: Greater Man'ari Intuition
Greater Man'ari Intuition.description: Increase all party and raid members armor by 285 and all primary stats by 12 for 30 min.

Grommash's Folly.name: Grommash's Folly
Grommash's Folly.description:
While Inner Demon is active, your melee haste is now increased by 15% and you now heal equal to 50% of all damage dealt by critical strikes with auto attacks.

In addition, critical strikes with Carve deal 5% increased damage, increasing up to 60% with each strike based on how long you channel.

Gul'dan's Gift.name: Gul'dan's Gift
Gul'dan's Gift.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Skull of Gul'dan by 50%, but its cooldown is increased by 30 sec.

Gul'dan's Prodigy.name: Gul'dan's Prodigy
Gul'dan's Prodigy.description: Reduces Energy cost and cast time of Fel Fireball by -15%.

Hateforged Barrier.name: Hateforged Barrier
Hateforged Barrier.description:
Manifest a barrier of pure hatred, absorbing 297 damage, scaling with your Stamina, for 30 sec.

While the barrier holds, you regenerate 2% of your maximum health every 2 sec.

Hellfire Carver.name: Hellfire Carver
Hellfire Carver.description:
Level 30 Passive
Casting Carve now makes your next Fel Fireball instant cast and causes it to strike 1 additional enemy near the primary target based on how long you channeled, up to a maximum of 10 enemies, dealing less damage with each target struck.

Herald of the Legion.name: Herald of the Legion
Herald of the Legion.description: Damage dealt by Bane of Chaos now radiates fel energy around the enemy, dealing 50% of the damage dealt to up to 8 nearby enemies.

Hidden Power.name: Hidden Power
Hidden Power.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell damage by 15% of your Intellect and Spirit.

In addition, Inner Demon now increases your spell damage and critical strike chance by an additional 20% of your Spirit.

Hulking Demon.name: Hulking Demon
Hulking Demon.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your attack power by 30% of your Stamina and your hit rating by 6% of your Agility.

Illidan's Favor.name: Illidan's Favor
Illidan's Favor.description: Removes the Energy cost of your Felbane and Manaburn and your Manaburn now strikes 4 additional enemies near the primary target.

Illidan's Guile.name: Illidan's Guile
Illidan's Guile.description:
Gorge on fel energy, becoming immune to all physical attacks and spells for 8 seconds, but during that time you cannot attack, move or cast spells.

At the end of the duration, your next Chaos Rush within 5 seconds now dashes an additional 20 yds.

Illidari Barrier.name: Illidari Barrier
Illidari Barrier.description: Casting Hateforged Barrier now also creates a damage absorption shield on all nearby allies within 15 yds, absorbing 328 + 100% Stamina + 20% SP + 8% AP damage for 5 seconds.

Illidari Intuition.name: Illidari Intuition
Illidari Intuition.description: Empowers an ally with demonic energy, increasing their Agility by 20. Lasts 30 min.

Illidari Magi.name: Illidari Magi
Illidari Magi.description: Your periodic damage now has a 20% chance to generate 1 Felfury.

Illidari Smiter.name: Illidari Smiter
Illidari Smiter.description: Critical strikes with Fel Fireball now generate 1 Felfury.

Illidari Training.name: Illidari Training
Illidari Training.description: Dodging an attack now generates 3 Energy.

Immolation Aura.name: Immolation Aura
Immolation Aura.description: Wreathe yourself in fire for up to 1 min, dealing 38 Fire Damage to nearby enemies every 3 sec.

Infernal.name: Infernal
Infernal.description:
Drop an infernal from the sky with grotesque magic, dealing 12 + 55% fire SP Fire damage to enemies in the radius, horrifying them for 4 seconds, and spawning an Infernal to fight by your side for 15 seconds.

Inner Demon: Lasts 1 additional sec.

Infernal Armor.name: Infernal Armor
Infernal Armor.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Hateforged Barrier by -10 sec.

Infernal Constitution.name: Infernal Constitution
Infernal Constitution.description: Increases your maximum health by 10% and increases your off-hand weapon damage by 30%.

Infernal Doom.name: Infernal Doom
Infernal Doom.description: Ruin now has a -25% chance not to consume Felfury.

Infernal Ruin.name: Infernal Ruin
Infernal Ruin.description: Every 3rd Ruin or Felwrath now spawns an Infernal to fight by your side for 15 seconds.

Infernal Summoner.name: Infernal Summoner
Infernal Summoner.description: Direct damage dealt now has a 5% chance to reset the cooldown of Infernal.

Infernal Whipcrack.name: Infernal Whipcrack
Infernal Whipcrack.description: Enrage up to 8 allies within 20 yds, reducing their damage taken by -15% and increasing their haste by 10% for 10 seconds.

Inner Demon.name: Inner Demon
Inner Demon.description:
|cff32cd32Consumes Felfury|r
Unleash your inner demon, increasing your damage dealt by 10%, and enabling |cff32cd32Inner Demon|r effects.

Lasts for 5 sec for each |cff32cd32Felfury|r consumed.

Legion March.name: Legion March
Legion March.description: Increases the range of Chaos Rush by 3 yds.

Legionfall.name: Legionfall
Legionfall.description: Melee ability damage now has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Annihilan Strike.

Legionfel Pact.name: Legionfel Pact
Legionfel Pact.description: Emanate an aura that increases nearby allies' Fire resistance by 0 and their chance to resist curses and magic effects by 15%.

Magic Fiend.name: Magic Fiend
Magic Fiend.description: Increases the amount of beneficial magic effects stolen by your Consume Magic by 1.

Man'ari Intuition.name: Man'ari Intuition
Man'ari Intuition.description:
Increase the friendly target's armor by 65 and all primary stats by 2 for 30 min.

@ext:Does not stack with other similar effects.:ext@

Man'ari Teachings.name: Man'ari Teachings
Man'ari Teachings.description:
Level 50 Passive
Increases your critical damage dealt by 100%.

Manaburn.name: Manaburn
Manaburn.description:
Burn an enemy's mana equal to 200% of your Stamina.

Deals damage equal to the mana drained.

Manafeed.name: Manafeed
Manafeed.description:
Feed on an enemy's mana, burning 22 of their mana and restoring health to you equal to the mana burned every 0.50 sec for 5 sec.

Usable while moving.

Mannoroth's Rage.name: Mannoroth's Rage
Mannoroth's Rage.description: Reduces the cooldown of Burning Hatred by -60 sec and removes its Energy cost.

Mark of Chaos.name: Mark of Chaos
Mark of Chaos.description: Using Chaos Rush increases the next instance of direct spell or ability damage within 5 seconds by 25%.

Nether Champion.name: Nether Champion
Nether Champion.description: Triggering Dancing Blades now increases the damage of next Sargeron Smite by 8% for 20 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Nether Disciple.name: Nether Disciple
Nether Disciple.description: Increases your dodge and parry chance by 3%.

Nether Spirit.name: Nether Spirit
Nether Spirit.description: Increases your spell critical strike chance by 20% of your Spirit.

Nether Strength.name: Nether Strength
Nether Strength.description: Casting Felfury spenders now reduces the cooldown of Burning Hatred, Hateforged Barrier, and Demonic Will by -1 sec.

Oblivion.name: Oblivion
Oblivion.description: Critically striking now increases your damage dealt by 1% for 4 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Oppressive Ruin.name: Oppressive Ruin
Oppressive Ruin.description: Damage dealt by Ruin now absorbs the next 99 healing on the target based on rank, up to 226 at rank 7, for 8 sec.

Outland Slaver.name: Outland Slaver
Outland Slaver.description: Reduces the cost of your Felrend and Fel Fireball by -3 and increases their damage dealt by 15%.

Pact Hunter.name: Pact Hunter
Pact Hunter.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Pacts by 50%.

Perpetual Fury.name: Perpetual Fury
Perpetual Fury.description: Dealing damage with Dancing Blades reduces the cooldown of Fury Unleashed by -1 sec.

Pit Lord's Rage.name: Pit Lord's Rage
Pit Lord's Rage.description:
Casting Chaos Rush now increases your Physical damage by 15% for 10 seconds.

Casting Felhoof Charge increases your critical strike chance by 6% for 15 seconds.

Pit Lord's Strength.name: Pit Lord's Strength
Pit Lord's Strength.description: Your Annihilation now affects 1 additional attack.

Pure Hatred.name: Pure Hatred
Pure Hatred.description: Your Hateforged Barrier now also scales with your dodge rating.

Reachwalker.name: Reachwalker
Reachwalker.description: Casting Chaos Rush now reduces the cooldown of Felhoof Charge by -2 sec.

Reckless Assault.name: Reckless Assault
Reckless Assault.description: Increases the damage of Azzinoth's Assault, Annihilan Strike, and Twin Slice by 15% against slowed enemies.

Reckoning.name: Reckoning
Reckoning.description:
For 10 seconds, your Fel Fireball is free of cost, instant cast, and strikes up to 4 targets.

For the duration, your falling speed is slowed and damage dealt by your Fel Fireball increases your damage dealt by 4% for 15 seconds, stacking 4 times.

Ruin.name: Ruin
Ruin.description:
|cff32cd32Consumes 2 Felfury|r
Bring doom upon an enemy, dealing 200 Shadowflame Damage to an enemy, piercing all absorption effects.

|cff32cd32Inner Demon|r: Deals an additional 30% of the damage dealt over 3 sec.

Sargeras Embrace.name: Sargeras Embrace
Sargeras Embrace.description:
Channel a beam of fel magic upon an enemy, slowing your target's movement speed by -60% for 5.5 seconds and dealing cond(gt(SPFI, SPS), 695+0+SPFI*0.85, 695+0+SPS*0.85) Shadowflame Damage at the end of the duration.

For the duration, you may instant cast Fel Fireball and Ruin while channeling and they refund their cost.

Sargeron Smite.name: Sargeron Smite
Sargeron Smite.description:
|cff32cd32Consumes 2 Felfury|r
Blast an enemy for 33 Shadowflame Damage and generate 20 Energy.

Scars of Suffering.name: Scars of Suffering
Scars of Suffering.description: Casting Azzinoth's Assault now scars the enemy, increasing your allies' attack power against them by 15% Agility for 10 seconds.

Scars of the Past.name: Scars of the Past
Scars of the Past.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Chaos Rush by -5 and casting Chaos Rush now heals you for 81 + 20% Stamina + 33% AP.

Sculptor of Doom.name: Sculptor of Doom
Sculptor of Doom.description: Landing 3 direct critical strikes now grants Sculptor of Doom.Sculptor of DoomYour next Ruin within 8 seconds is instant cast.

Shadow Magi.name: Shadow Magi
Shadow Magi.description: Reduces the cooldown of Annihilation by -15 sec and Sunder by -4 sec.

Skull of Gul'dan.name: Skull of Gul'dan
Skull of Gul'dan.description: Consume the essence of the skull of Gul'dan, increasing your maximum health and Energy by 25% for 10 seconds.

Slayer's Pact.name: Slayer's Pact
Slayer's Pact.description:
Emanate an aura that increases the mounted movement speed of nearby allies by 20%.

Only 1 |cffffffffPact|r can be active per player at a time.

Slice & Dice.name: Slice & Dice
Slice & Dice.description: Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25% and reduces the Energy cost of Twin Slice by -5.

Spite.name: Spite
Spite.description: Increases your Agility by 8% and dodge chance by 3%.

Straight to the Nether.name: Straight to the Nether
Straight to the Nether.description: While Inner Demon is active, Carve and Sargeron Smite now leeches 20% of the damage dealt from the initial strike as Shadowflame Damage.

Suffering.name: Suffering
Suffering.description: Increases the duration of Skull of Gul'dan by 5 sec.

Sunder.name: Sunder
Sunder.description:
|cff32cd32Consumes 2 Felfury|r
Sunder the ground progressively infront of you, causing 3 explosions one after another that deal 10 Chaos Damage, split amongst all enemies struck, plus 18 over 12 sec.

|cff32cd32Inner Demon|r: Affected enemies have their attack power reduced by 23 for 20 sec.

Taskmaster's Army.name: Taskmaster's Army
Taskmaster's Army.description: Reduces the cooldown of Infernal Whipcrack by -30 sec and it now affects all allies and its radius is increased by 15 yds.

The True Blessing.name: The True Blessing
The True Blessing.description: Casting Annihilation now grants you Sculptor of Doom.Sculptor of DoomYour next Ruin within 8 seconds is instant cast.

True Self.name: True Self
True Self.description:
Level 20 Passive
Your Inner Demon now grants 10% increased dodge chance and critical damage dealt while active.

Twin Fury.name: Twin Fury
Twin Fury.description: Critically striking with Twin Slice or Annihilan Strike now generates an additional 1 Felfury.

Twin Slice.name: Twin Slice
Twin Slice.description:
|cff32cd32Generates 1 Felfury|r
Strike with both weapons for 90% Weapon Damage plus 10 with each strike.

Twisted Sight.name: Twisted Sight
Twisted Sight.description:
Summon a demonic eye and bind your vision to it and then slip into the nether.

You and the eye remain stealthed while active. The eye moves quickly, but is very fragile.

Tyrannical Resolve.name: Tyrannical Resolve
Tyrannical Resolve.description:
Taunt nearby enemies for 4 seconds and ignore -50% of all damage taken for 30 seconds, up to 100% of your maximum health.

When this ends, you unleash a Felfire Blast that leeches health from nearby enemies based on how many times you took damage with the effect active.

Tyrant's Gaze.name: Tyrant's Gaze
Tyrant's Gaze.description:
Set your fiery gaze upon an enemy and all enemies nearby, intimidating them and causing them to combust, dealing 220 + 35% AP Shadowflame Damage to them.

Damaging an enemy in this way heals you for 146 + 50% AP and generates 1 Felfury.

Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

Unbound.name: Unbound
Unbound.description:
Level 30 Passive
Increases your dodge by 15% of your Agility and your hit rating by 6% of your Agility.

Unholy Endurance.name: Unholy Endurance
Unholy Endurance.description: Increases the damage and threat generated from Carve by 15%.

Unphased.name: Unphased
Unphased.description:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your spell penetration by 20, scaling with your level.

In addition, reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 50% while Inner Demon is active.

Vengeance.name: Vengeance
Vengeance.description: Your Twin Slice and Felrend now have a 60% chance to generate 1 additional Felfury.

Vengeance Is Mine.name: Vengeance Is Mine
Vengeance Is Mine.description: Dodging or parrying an attack now gives you a 10% chance to make your next 10 instances of damage with Twin Slice deal 30% increased damage and generate 1 Felfury.

Vengeful Pact.name: Vengeful Pact
Vengeful Pact.description: Emanate an aura that increases nearby allies' Shadow Resistance by 5 and causes them to deal 4 Shadow damage to enemies that attack them.

Warden's End.name: Warden's End
Warden's End.description: Reduces the cooldown of Mana Burn and Illidan's Guile by -20%.

Warlock Training.name: Warlock Training
Warlock Training.description: Cripple now causes the enemy target to be unable to critically strike for 4 seconds.

Whirling Vengeance.name: Whirling Vengeance
Whirling Vengeance.description:
Reduces the cooldown of Fury Unleashed by -60 sec. 

When Fury Unleashed ends, you strike all nearby enemies for 757 + 56.14% AP Shadowflame Damage and increase their damage taken from Sunder by 100% for 15 seconds.

Whispers of the Pit.name: Whispers of the Pit
Whispers of the Pit.description:
Unleash fel energy upon enemies at target location, fearing them and slowing their movement speed by -80% for 8 seconds.

Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

Withering.name: Withering
Withering.description: Your Fel Fireballs used with Felforged active now deal 30% increased damage.

Wrath of Sargeras.name: Wrath of Sargeras
Wrath of Sargeras.description: Increases your Magic damage dealt by 3% and your spell hit chance by 2%.

You Cheat, Gul'dan!.name: You Cheat, Gul'dan!
You Cheat, Gul'dan!.description: Increases your critical damage by 50% against enemies above 75% health.
